description: Refactor wirelessagent CLI project into a backend service with RESTful APIs

features.description: Create proper Python project structure with app/, tests/, docs/ directories following FastAPI best practices
acceptance_criteria: Directory structure follows FastAPI project template
__init__.py files present in all Python packages
Separate directories for API, core, models, services, utils
steps: Create app/ directory with api/, core/, models/, services/, utils/ subdirectories
Create tests/ directory with unit/ and integration/ subdirectories
Create scripts/ directory for utility scripts
Add __init__.py to all Python package directories

features.description: Implement proper configuration management using Pydantic Settings with environment variable support
steps: Create app/core/config.py with Pydantic Settings
Define configuration classes for different environments
Move hardcoded API keys and paths to environment variables
Create .env.example file with required variables

features.description: Define Pydantic models for request/response schemas, network state, and user data
acceptance_criteria: All input/output data has Pydantic models
Models for User, NetworkSlice, AllocationRequest, AllocationResponse
Enum classes for slice types (eMBB, URLLC, mMTC)
steps: Create app/models/user.py with User-related models
Create app/models/network.py with NetworkSlice, ResourceAllocation models
Create app/models/request.py with request/response schemas
Define enums for SliceType, AllocationStatus in app/models/enums.py

features.description: Extract business logic from CLI scripts into reusable service classes
acceptance_criteria: ResourceCalculator implements Shannon formula and rate calculations
steps: Create app/services/network_slicing.py with NetworkSlicingService
Create app/services/intent_understanding.py with IntentUnderstandingService
Create app/services/resource_calculator.py with calculation functions
Create app/services/state_manager.py for global state management

features.description: Create FastAPI application with proper application factory pattern
acceptance_criteria: FastAPI app created with factory pattern (create_app function)
steps: Create app/main.py with create_app factory function
Add CORS middleware configuration
Add startup/shutdown event handlers
Create app/api/health.py with health check endpoint

features.description: Implement RESTful API endpoints for network slicing operations
steps: Create app/api/v1/endpoints/allocations.py with allocation endpoints
Create app/api/v1/endpoints/network.py with network state endpoints
Create app/api/v1/endpoints/intent.py with intent understanding endpoint
Create app/api/v1/router.py to aggregate all API routers

features.description: Implement Celery or FastAPI BackgroundTasks for async processing of allocations
acceptance_criteria: Async allocation processing for batch requests
Background task queue for resource calculations
steps: Add celery or FastAPI BackgroundTasks to requirements
Create app/worker/celery_app.py for Celery configuration (if using Celery)
Create app/services/task_service.py for task management
Add task status endpoints in app/api/v1/endpoints/tasks.py

features.description: Add WebSocket endpoints for real-time network state updates
acceptance_criteria: WebSocket endpoint at /ws/network for real-time updates
Broadcast network state changes to connected clients
Support for subscribing to specific slice updates
steps: Create app/api/v1/endpoints/websocket.py with WebSocket endpoint
Create app/services/connection_manager.py for managing WebSocket connections
Add WebSocket route to main application
Implement broadcast mechanism for network state updates

features.description: Set up comprehensive testing with pytest, including unit and integration tests
acceptance_criteria: Unit tests for all service classes
steps: Create pytest.ini with test configuration
Add pytest, pytest-asyncio, pytest-cov, httpx to requirements-dev.txt
Create tests/conftest.py with fixtures
Create tests/unit/test_services.py for service unit tests
Create tests/integration/test_api.py for API integration tests

features.description: Create comprehensive API documentation with OpenAPI/Swagger and README
acceptance_criteria: Comprehensive README with setup and usage instructions
steps: Ensure FastAPI auto-generates OpenAPI schema
Add custom OpenAPI metadata in app/main.py
Create README.md with installation and usage guide
Create docs/architecture.md with system design
Create docs/api_examples.md with usage examples

features.description: Create Docker configuration and deployment files for production deployment
acceptance_criteria: Gunicorn/Uvicorn configuration for production ASGI server
steps: Create Dockerfile with multi-stage build
Create docker-compose.yml for local development
Create docker-compose.prod.yml with production settings
Create .dockerignore file
Create gunicorn.conf.py with production ASGI configuration

features.description: Implement structured logging, metrics collection, and health monitoring
acceptance_criteria: Structured JSON logging with configurable levels
Health check endpoint with dependency status
steps: Create app/core/logging.py with structured JSON logger
Create app/middleware/logging.py with request/response middleware
Create app/api/v1/endpoints/metrics.py with Prometheus metrics
Enhance health check endpoint with dependency checks
Add error handlers with alerting integration points
